prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约22261→25895→26321→31850→40924名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约14600名，2025年基准位次约40924名，后移幅 度明显加大；2021–2024年本省物理类计划稳定在41–42人，2025年增至48人；2026年计划大幅扩至71人，较2025年扩招约47.9%，为近年最大扩招幅度， 显著缓解竞争压力，位次数字应明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第77名，近年排名稳定在77–81区间，属中上游211层次；第五轮学科评估中化学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的化学专业直接对应，对相关 专业报考有一定吸引力；2024年声誉评价偏负面（校内安全事件），2026年声誉数据中未出现福州大学相关事件；抖音热度排名第88、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注 升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见福州大学断档信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，福州大学在上述领域均有招生；生化环材、土木建筑类明显劝 退，该校相关专业位次靠后；河北省2026年高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（约606754人）小幅增加约0.5%，竞争略有加剧；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分升至202 5年459分，呈逐年上升趋势；福州大学位于福建省，与河北省跨省招生；该校在河北省招生规模较小（物理类2025年48人），属省外招生，地域偏好对报考影响 有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约47.9%是最大影响因素，但河北省考生总数小幅增加及学校声誉偏负面形成微 弱上移压力；在2025年基准40924名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约52890名，区间52390–53390名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 22261 → 25895 → 26321 → 31850 → 40924, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 14600 positions in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 40924, and the backward shift has significantly increased. From 2021 to 2024, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was stable at 41–42 students, increasing to 48 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands substantially to 71 students, an increase of about 47.9% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly alleviating competition pressure, and the ranking numbers should clearly shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 77–81 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry received an A- rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Chemistry major in enrollment, which has some appeal for related major applications. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but in 2026 reputation data, no related incidents for Fuzhou University appeared. Douyin popularity ranking is 88th with an evaluation of 'average', short video exposure is at a medium-low level, with no clear signal of increased application attention. No signs of enrollment gaps for Fuzhou University were found in historical abnormal admission records.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Fuzhou University offers enrollment in these fields. Majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, and Civil Engineering/Architecture are clearly discouraged, and the university's related majors have lower rankings. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province college entrance exam takers is about 609,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025 (about 606,754), slightly intensifying competition. For the provincial control line, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, showing an upward trend year by year. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with cross-provincial enrollment from Hebei Province. The university's enrollment scale in Hebei Province is relatively small (48 students in Physics Category in 2025), making it an out-of-province enrollment, and regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings and the significant 47.9% enrollment expansion in 2026 as the biggest influencing factor, but the slight increase in the total number of Hebei Province examinees and the somewhat negative school reputation create a weak upward pressure. Based on the 2025 baseline of 40924, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 52890, with a range of 52390–53390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 52890, range 52390–53390. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (52390) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science, Electronics, and Integrated Circuits; those in the middle of the range are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors, while also considering advantageous majors like Chemistry (A- discipline); those with rankings near or above the upper limit of the range (53390) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2654 → 3155 → 4056 → 3741 → 4170, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with the 2025 baseline ranking at about 4170; from 2021 to 2026, the provincial History Category plan remained stable at 8 students, with no expansion or reduction, so the plan factor has no direct impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), and no related incidents for Fuzhou University appeared in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranked 88th with an evaluation of "average," showing no significant increase in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, but the History Category enrollment majors (Finance, Administrative Management) are not directly related to Chemistry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Finance/Economics/Economy majors is divided and wait-and-see; Administrative Management belongs to the Public Management category with average popularity; the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025, with History Category students accounting for about 40%, estimated at about 245,000, a slight increase from 2025 (244,000), leading to a slight intensification of competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, showing an upward trend; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with cross-provincial enrollment from Hebei Province; the History Category plan has only 8 students, a very small-scale out-of-province enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight increase in the total number of Hebei Province examinees, and the somewhat negative university reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 4170; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4200, with a range of 3700–4700.
